title: erysimum incanum subsp. mairei
intro: Erysimum incanum subsp. mairei is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the Maire's wallflower. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are due to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. The health benefits of Erysimum incanum subsp. mairei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
